enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Uyire'?

'En Uyire' translates to 'My Life', expressing deep emotions of love and longing.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song reflects the protagonist's feelings of yearning and connection with their beloved, enhancing the romantic narrative of Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Achu, with lyrics penned by Rohini.

When was 'En Uyire' released?

'En Uyire' was released on February 15, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'En Uyire', the protagonist expresses their deep feelings of love and longing, beautifully captured through Rohini's heartfelt lyrics. The song plays a significant role in the movie Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey, highlighting the emotional turmoil of love. The soothing melody, composed by Achu, evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning. This romantic ballad resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love and desire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Uyire from Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey captures the essence of longing and love with its haunting melody. The collaboration of Rohini's poignant lyrics and Achu's soulful composition creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song is a perfect blend of romance and melancholy, making it a must-listen for anyone who has ever loved deeply.
stanzaMeanings: My soul, my soul, come closer, beautiful girl. Time has come, my thirst is quenched. What is this magic I am singing? I have desires, but anger has stopped me. I would say, you are my breeze. My soul, my soul, come closer, beautiful girl. You are everywhere, just see, you are within me. Don't go away, honey, don't go away. I am nothing without you. Let me say one word, I will live the life within that moment. Are you the address of my soul? Girl, are you? A dream that Bharathi spoke of. Before, honey, because of you, I floated like a feather. You should come like my breeze and give unconsciousness to my mind. Honey, I will wait for you, address of my soul. My soul, my soul.
